feature: drift init command with built-in profiles (default, vibe-coding, strict)
evidence: 24 new tests in tests/test_init_cmd.py: 10 profile registry tests (existence, lookup, weights comparison, thresholds), 14 init command tests (YAML generation, profile selection, CI workflow, git hooks, MCP config, --full, skip-if-exists, DriftConfig validation, policies, next-steps output). Full regression suite: 1200 passed, 0 failed.

profiles_module.impact: Built-in Profile dataclass registry with 3 profiles: default (balanced), vibe-coding (upweights MDS/PFS/BAT/TPD, lower thresholds), strict (fail-on medium)

init_command.impact: New CLI command 'drift init' scaffolds drift.yaml, GitHub Actions workflow, git pre-push hook, and VS Code MCP config in one step

cli_registration.impact: init command registered in Click CLI group
